menu_options.batch: Create all device types at once

remove_all.title: Remove all simulated devices
remove_all.description:
This will permanently remove all {count} simulated device(s) and their entities. This cannot be undone.

Click Submit to confirm.

single.title: Add simulated device
single.description: Create a new virtual device and its entities.

batch.title: Create all device types
batch.description: Create one simulated device for each of the 24 supported device types. Each will be added as a separate device in Home Assistant.

data_description.name_prefix: Prepended to each device name, e.g. "Sim" → "Sim Smart Light". Leave blank to use the device type name as-is.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Discovered simulated device
zeroconf_confirm.description: A simulated device named {name} was discovered. Confirm to add it.

abort.already_configured: A simulated device with this name and type already exists.
abort.no_discovery_data: Missing discovery details. Please try discovery again.
abort.batch_initiated: All 24 device types are being created in the background. They will appear in your devices list shortly.
abort.dashboard_generated: Dashboard generated. Navigate to Simulated Devices in the sidebar, or refresh your browser if it was already open.
abort.all_devices_removed: All simulated devices have been removed.

data_description.simulation_profile: Controls behavioral patterns: Random (pure random), Home (occupied daytime), Away (unoccupied), Night (sleeping hours).

reset_battery.name: Reset Battery
reset_battery.description: Reset the simulated battery level to 100%.

force_state.name: Force State
force_state.description: Override one or more state keys on a simulated device.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the simulated device.

state_updates.name: State Updates
state_updates.description: Dictionary of state key/value pairs to apply.

trigger_event.name: Trigger Event
trigger_event.description: Manually fire an event on a button device or doorbell.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the simulated device.

event_type.name: Event Type
event_type.description: The event type to fire (e.g. single_press, double_press, long_press, press).

set_profile.name: Set Simulation Profile
set_profile.description: Change the simulation profile at runtime.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the simulated device.

profile.name: Profile
profile.description: One of: random, home, away, night.

inject_fault.name: Inject Fault
inject_fault.description: Instantly trigger a fault condition with optional auto-clear.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the simulated device.

fault_type.name: Fault Type
fault_type.description: The fault condition to inject: smoke_alarm, co_alarm, leak, motion, tamper, overload, battery_critical, offline.

duration_seconds.name: Duration (seconds)
duration_seconds.description: Seconds before the fault auto-clears. Default is 30.
